LanguageData.VRecyclingE_BasicRecycling.description: Develop basic waste recovery systems for turning toxic refuse into usable industrial feedstock.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_BasicRecycling.label: Poseidon waste recovery
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_ComplexRecycling.description: Expand waste recovery into sealed reclamation lines for alloy, isotope, and compacted refuse products.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_ComplexRecycling.label: Poseidon advanced reclamation
